Every once in while to drive us crazy, no, I'm just kidding, to basically kind of do like an overall review of the internet and like websites across the board.

Yeah, it's an algo update.

So what they usually do in these cases is they, they weed out like, you know, the spammy sites, they penalize sites, they will, they will, they will look at how they, you know, how they want to prioritize rankings and who, what comes up first and queries, that kind of things.
Um, making sure that content is actually, um, providing value to the reader, um, they haven't, they're usually pretty guarded about like what will be included in the, um, update when it rolls out.
So, and then.
Usually after the fact, they kind of give an all-around update of this is what we did.
And then from there, what we usually do is if we need to pivot or fix anything or update an article based on that, then we can always jump in and go back in.

But in my experience, the past few updates have tended to be more about weeding out spam sites, punishing sites that are just, not providing, like they're just farm sites or not good content, that kind of thing.

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Discern and GrowthX to discuss content performance, strategy, and upcoming content clusters.](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Strong performance: 10k+ jump in impressions, stable clicks despite industry-wide fluctuations](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Google core update rolling out: expect traffic instability for \~3 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [New content clusters proposed: LLC formations, vertical-specific (e.g., private equity), and benefits/use cases](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
  - [Discern seeing significant increase in qualified leads (46 last month vs. previous best of 22)](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)

## Topics

### Performance Overview

  - [Impressions up by 10k+ week-over-week](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Average article position improved by a couple of spots](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=266.0)
  - [Clicks slightly down (-5) but not alarming; consistent with industry trends](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Top queries related to franchise tax for Illinois, Wyoming, Tennessee](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=309.0)
  - [Healthy growth trend over past 11 weeks](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

### Google Core Update

  - [Rolling out now, causing expected traffic instability](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)
  - [Typically targets spam sites, prioritizes valuable content](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=388.0)
  - [GrowthX team monitoring closely, ready to pivot if needed](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=483.0)
  - [General SEO best practices still crucial for both search and LLM performance](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)

### Content Strategy

  - [New clusters proposed:](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=992.0)
    1.  LLC formations (state-specific, starting with TX, CA, NY)
    2.  Vertical-specific (e.g., private equity, fund management)
    3.  Benefits and use cases (registered agent benefits, multi-state management)
  - [Emphasis on longer-tail keywords to boost LLM search performance](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1194.0)
  - [Mike to review new clusters before implementation](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)

### Discern Business Update

  - [Significant increase in inbound leads (46 last month vs. previous best of 22)](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=740.0)
  - [March 1st and June 30th are key dates for Delaware entities' franchise taxes](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Private equity identified as a high-value vertical (first major client signed)](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1176.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mike to review proposed content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [GrowthX to tag Mike/Doug for approval on initial posts from new clusters](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1260.0)
  - [Continue current content production while awaiting cluster approval](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=1157.0)
  - [Explore potential for date-specific content around key franchise tax deadlines](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
  - [Monitor performance metrics, especially in light of Google core update](https://fathom.video/share/UvWbKBDJdqtGx-76ujCgT27DxnuLbMBK?tab=summary&timestamp=347.0)

action_items.description: Add new content clusters to Airtable; include LLC formations, vertical-specific, and benefits/use cases topics
Tag Mike in Airtable for new content clusters; have him review and approve themes
Tag Mike and Doug in Airtable for first few posts from new clusters for review before writing
